name: Royal ONE™ Visa Signature® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Limited-time offer: Earn 45,000 Royal Caribbean points after spending $2,000 in purchases in the first 90 days from account opening.
notes: Official Bank of America product page and Royal Caribbean program page confirm the new Royal ONE card product line.
Doctor of Credit reported the public launch bonus and linked the current offer as of 2026-07-15.

earning_rates.category: Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea purchases
earning_rates.notes: 3x points per $1 on qualifying purchases with Royal Caribbean Group brands
2x points per $1 on EV charging station purchases
1x point per $1 on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Priority Boarding
other_benefits.description: Priority boarding through the suite entrance for Royal Caribbean and Celebrity Cruises voyages

other_benefits.name: Anniversary Reward
other_benefits.description: $100 cruise discount after spending $10,000 within a cardmember year

other_benefits.name: Visa Signature Benefits
other_benefits.description: Visa Signature travel benefits and protections

sources.notes: Official Bank of America Royal ONE product page

rules.description: Bank of America may be less likely to approve applicants who have opened 5 or more new credit cards in the past 24 months.

recurring_credits.name: Anniversary Cruise Discount
recurring_credits.description: $100 cruise discount after spending $10,000 within a cardmember year.
